title: Bahrain Domain Registry Rules and FAQs
summary: Explains registration, registrar selection, eligibility, domain lifecycle, renewal, registrar transfer, registrant transfer, contact accuracy and auth-code processes for .bh domain names.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.internet_: Operational rules for registering and managing .bh domain names.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Resolution No. 3 of 2008 and Resolution No. 6 of 2021
